title: New Bedwars
description: A modern, feature-rich Bedwars plugin for Paper servers with multi-arena support, custom shops & upgrades, configurable game phases, and multi-language scoreboards. Originally started in 2021, now publicly released.

title: NPCSpeak
description: A Paper plugin that gives Minecraft NPCs real, in-character conversations powered by an LLM (local Ollama or any OpenAI-compatible API), with a task system that negotiates, persuades, or interrogates and only fires rewards once an independent AI evaluator confirms the task was genuinely completed.

title: BetterContainers
description: Enhances chests and storage blocks with sorting, auto-stacking, container locking, and a clean custom GUI. Supports 1.7.x–1.16.x. No longer maintained.
